# DATA.GOV.HK Terms Reference

The `HKSCS2016.json` data is published through DATA.GOV.HK by the Digital
Policy Office of the Government of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region.

DATA.GOV.HK terms:

- https://data.gov.hk/en/terms-and-conditions

Source attribution to keep with redistributed builds:

> Hong Kong Supplementary Character Set related information, Digital Policy
> Office, the Government of the Hong Kong Special Administrative Region,
> DATA.GOV.HK.
